news.headline: EQUITIES TOUCH PREMARKET HIGH

news.summary: Irvine, California - Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FOXX), known for its consumer electronics and IoT solutions, revealed its inclusion in the Russell Microcap ® Index in the 2025 annual reconstitution list by FTSE Russell. As part of the telecommunications sector additions, this marks a major achievement for the Company. The updated indexes will come into effect post the U.S. market closure on June 27th.
news.headline: Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FOXX) to join Russell Microcap Index, a milestone for the Company, effective June 27.

news.summary: Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) has revealed plans to be an Icon Sponsor at the 2025 Databricks Data + AI Summit, which will be held at the Moscone Center in San Francisco from June 9-12. The event will feature showcases of Domo's AI and data products platform. In collaboration with Sol de Janeiro, a beauty brand bought by L'Occitane in 2021, Domo will highlight their partnership's impact on enhancing crucial business insights and broadening data accessibility across the organization. Attendees can expect cutting-edge presentations at the Summit.
news.headline: Domo showcasing AI and data products at 2025 Data + AI Summit in San Francisco. Sol de Janeiro to present partnership, transforming business insights.

news.summary: Know Labs, Inc., a technology company focused on non-invasive health monitoring solutions, revealed a new agreement with Goldeneye 1995 LLC to acquire a majority stake. This deal, involving NYSE American: KNW, will see Greg Kidd, an affiliate of the buyer and former Ripple Chief Risk Officer, take on the role of Chief Executive Officer. This move marks a significant transition for the company and is poised to reshape its leadership structure.
news.headline: Greg Kidd to acquire controlling interest in Know Labs, introducing Bitcoin treasury strategy. Kidd to become CEO.

news.summary: In San Francisco, iContact Camera Pro has been introduced as a Zoom-Certified webcam capable of 4K resolution. This innovative camera features a retractable design aimed at facilitating genuine eye contact during video calls, enhancing the overall experience.
news.headline: iContact Camera Pro is a 4K webcam with retractable design for real eye contact on video calls.

news.summary: In New York, Derivative Path, a top provider of cloud-based technology and advisory solutions for capital markets, was awarded Best Cloud Provider to the Sell Side at the 2025 WatersTechnology Sell-Side Technology Awards. This is the third consecutive year Derivative Path has won this title, underscoring their dedication to providing scalable, secure, and integrated cloud services to capital markets players. This recognition showcases their ongoing commitment to delivering quality solutions.
news.headline: Derivative Path wins Best Cloud Provider at WatersTechnology Awards for the third year, offering secure cloud solutions.

news.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) exceeded revenue expectations in the first quarter, reporting $2.37 billion, surpassing the projected $2.36 billion. Earnings for the quarter were $2.60 per share, aligning with analyst forecasts. CEO Calvin McDonald attributed the success to growth in various channels, categories, and markets, particularly in the U.S. The company received positive feedback from customers for its product innovations and brand initiatives globally. For the second quarter, Lululemon anticipates revenue ranging from $2.54 billion to $2.56 billion, slightly lower than the estimated $2.56 billion. More details are accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Lululemon beats Q1 revenue estimate with $2.37 billion; forecasted Q2 revenue of $2.54 billion to $2.56 billion. Analysts cut forecasts.

news.summary: Deepwatch, a top provider of AI-driven managed detection and response (MDR), has shifted its headquarters from Tampa, Florida to Palo Alto, California. This relocation to 250 Cambridge Avenue in Palo Alto marks a significant step in the company's expansion plan and dedication to pioneering advancements in AI and cybersecurity. The move places Deepwatch at the heart of the global tech scene, underscoring its commitment to innovation.
news.headline: Deepwatch relocates HQ from Tampa to Palo Alto for AI innovation in cybersecurity, at 250 Cambridge Avenue.

news.summary: Neovera, based in Reston, Virginia, is a technology partner focusing on cybersecurity, cloud services, and complex IT solutions. They were recently named on the 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list, which showcases the top IT services firms in North America based on revenue. Neovera ranked among the largest solution providers, with a combined revenue totaling $548.9 billion. This recognition highlights their position as a trusted advisor in the industry.
news.headline: Neovera recognized on 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list for revenue exceeding $548.9 billion.

news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC – CyberQP and Pax8 announced a partnership to enhance worldwide availability of Zero Trust Helpdesk Security in the APAC, ANZ, and North American regions.
news.headline: CyberQP and Pax8 partner to expand Zero Trust Helpdesk Security globally in APAC, ANZ, and North America.

news.summary: Houston-based Liongard has recently announced the acquisition of an AI-powered vulnerability platform from Darklight, further enhancing their cyber risk intelligence capabilities. This acquisition is a significant move for Liongard as they continue to expand their offerings in the cybersecurity sector. The new platform is expected to bolster Liongard's ability to detect and mitigate vulnerabilities in real-time, providing clients with advanced protection against cyber threats. This acquisition showcases Liongard's commitment to staying at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation and solidifying their position as a key player in the industry.
news.headline: Liongard expands cybersecurity with acquisition of AI-powered vulnerability platform from Darklight in Houston.

news.summary: FIFA is introducing its own primary blockchain to oversee digital assets, ticketing, and fan interactions, aiming to revolutionize football for numerous global fans.
news.headline: FIFA creating blockchain to revolutionize fan experiences, ticketing for 5B supporters, transforming football globally.

news.summary: Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE), a leader in cloud storage solutions, revealed that its customer IDC LA successfully reduced costs by 75% by utilizing Backblaze B2 Cloud Storage as their main off-site backup option. In search of a scalable, secure, and budget-friendly disaster recovery and nearline storage solution, IDC LA turned to Backblaze due to the high costs and limitations posed by their previous cloud provider. With this switch, IDC LA experienced significant savings and enhanced flexibility in their storage strategy.
news.headline: Backblaze helps IDC LA slash storage costs by 75% using B2 Cloud Storage, saving on expenses.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, intoPIX, a leading provider of low-latency, lightweight AV-over-IP compression solutions, is excited to announce its ongoing partnership with Nextera Video and Adeas. They will be presenting the newest FPGA advancements of the JPEG XS TDC solutions specifically designed for IPMX and ST 2110. The demonstration will highlight integration with Nextera-Adeas’ top-tier IPMX/ST 2110 cores optimized for AMD Zynq™ 7000 series SoCs and modules. The showcase is scheduled to occur at the upcoming Infocomm Show.
news.headline: intoPIX & Nextera-Adeas team up to demo new IPMX design with JPEG XS on Compact FPGAs at Infocomm 2025 - ORLANDO, Fla.

news.summary: A database titled "Europe Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been incorporated into ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. It is projected that Europe will witness an increase in data center capacity, reaching approximately 17.5 gigawatts of power capacity in the near future. Among European countries, the UK stands out as the leader in the upcoming data center market, accounting for nearly 25% of the total power capacity. In the region, Digital Realty holds the top position as the largest data center operator, trailed by Equinix and NTT DATA. Additionally, Portugal is noted as one of the emerging data center locations.
news.headline: Europe Data Center Portfolio Report lists 1396 existing, 252 upcoming centers with 17.5 GW power capacity. UK leads with 25%. Top operators include Digital Realty, Equinix, and NTT DATA.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Kargo, a prominent industrial artificial intelligence (AI) technology company, revealed a significant $18.4 million funding round. This investment was spearheaded by Matter Venture Partners, with previous backers Sozo Ventures and Founders Fund joining in, alongside contributions from existing clients and fresh strategic investors Lineage and Armada Supply Chain Solutions, LLC. Kargo additionally unveiled the effective implementation of its computer vision system at 240 Armada dock doors, aimed at streamlining inventory management processes.
news.headline: Kargo secures $18.4M for AI tech, partners with Lineage and Armada for inventory management, aims at industry standards.

news.summary: Pattern recently introduced a range of AI-driven tools at the Accelerate Summit in Salt Lake City. These tools, which include GEO Scorecard, Chessboard, TrendVision, and The Portal, are intended to revolutionize the ecommerce sector.
news.headline: Pattern unveils AI-powered ecommerce tools at Accelerate Summit, including GEO Scorecard, Chessboard, TrendVision, and The Portal.

news.summary: CTG, Inc., based in Buffalo, New York, has recently joined the GS1 US Solution Partner Program as an Executive member. This signifies their dedication to providing services and solutions that facilitate the swift, effective, and precise implementation of GS1 Standards. GS1 US is an organization focused on information standards, fostering collaboration among industry groups to enhance supply chain operations through the integration of GS1 Standards. These standards, recognized as the most commonly used in the world, play a crucial role in streamlining processes across various sectors.
news.headline: CTG joins GS1 US Solution Partner Program to enhance GS1 Standards implementation; supports supply-chain industry.

news.summary: A well-known expert in brain tumors at the University of Southern California is expediting four clinical trials, with the main drug candidate, NEO100, expected to finish Phase 2a earlier than planned.
news.headline: NeOnc Tech appoints Dr. Josh Neman as Chief Clinical Officer to advance oncology programs; speeding up four trials, including NEO100.
HighCo released news about their shareholding, with a significant change in ownership.

news.summary: AGF Investments Inc. (AGF Investments) disclosed a revised final distribution amount for AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF (ticker: QGB) on April 25, 2025. The ETF, listed as (TSX:AGF.B), provided the updated details.
news.headline: AGF Investments revises final distribution for AGF Systematic Global Multi-Sector Bond ETF (ticker: QGB) in Toronto.
US ADDS 139,000 JOBS IN MAY

news.summary: In Snowmass, CO on June 6, 2025, Envoy Technologies Inc. revealed the extension of its upscale electric car-sharing service to three prestigious properties managed by East West Hospitality. Envoy, a subsidiary of Blink Charging Co., specializes in offering electric car-sharing solutions. The expansion will provide residents and visitors in Snowmass, Colorado with access to premium vehicles for eco-friendly transportation.
news.headline: Envoy introduces luxury EV car-sharing at Snowmass properties managed by East West Hospitality in Colorado.

news.summary: Upwork has added Dana Evan and Glenn Kelman to its Board of Directors. These new members bring significant operational expertise in financial strategy, market leadership, and platform scaling. Dana Evan has a strong background in financial strategy, while Glenn Kelman is known for expertise in market leadership. Their addition is expected to further strengthen Upwork's board with their experience and knowledge.
news.headline: Upwork adds Dana Evan & Glenn Kelman to Board of Directors for growth; expertise in finance, markets, platform.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, KMT-Hansa Corp. revealed a significant development as it signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Lixu (ASUS) Innovations Limited. Lixu, an independent Taiwanese company, specializes in creating cutting-edge products and services for AI and Web3.0 sectors, focusing on the Tera10 ecosystem. The collaboration outlines a potential strategic partnership between the two entities, aiming to establish KMT as a leader in Web 3.0 hardware and software integration. This move underscores KMT's commitment to innovation and diversification in emerging technologies, leveraging Lixu’s expertise in the field.
news.headline: KMT-Hansa and Lixu (ASUS) Innovations Limited sign MOU for potential strategic partnership in Web 3.0; focus on Tera10 ecosystem.

news.summary: Itafos Inc. (IFOS) disclosed its participation in the Sidoti Small Cap Conference happening on June 12, 2025, at 4:00 PM EDT. The Company will be presenting at the event, providing insights to attendees. The virtual conference will offer a platform for stakeholders to engage with IFOS. To participate in the event, interested individuals can register at the provided link: https://loom.ly/AeaJJ7o.
news.headline: Itafos Inc. (TSX-V: IFOS) to present at Sidoti Small Cap Conference on June 12, 2025 at 4:00 PM EDT.

news.summary: Attached are notifications of transactions by key insiders regarding the automatic cash settlement of synthetic shares granted by shareholders at the 2023 and 2024 Annual General Meetings. These shares became fully vested on the date of the 2025 AGM.
news.headline: Primary insiders must notify trades relating to cash settlement of synthetic shares from AGMs 2023 and 2024, vested on 2025 AGM.

news.summary: Unit Corporation, a Tulsa-based energy company trading under the OTCQX symbol UNTC, revealed plans to issue a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for the second quarter of 2025. Shareholders registered as of June 17, 2025, will receive this dividend on June 27, 2025. The company will utilize cash reserves on its balance sheet to finance this dividend. Unit Corporation and its subsidiaries operate in the oil industry.
news.headline: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) will pay $1.25 per share as a quarterly cash dividend on June 27, 2025, for shareholders as of June 17, 2025.

news.summary: In Denver, Oblong, Inc. (Nasdaq: OBLG), a tech services firm known for its innovative IT solutions, recently revealed a securities purchase agreement to secure around $7.5 million. This will be achieved through the sale of 1,989,392 common stock shares (or equivalents) at $3.77 per share in a private placement under Nasdaq rules. The funding, led by institutional investors, aims to boost the company's operations and expansion.
news.headline: Oblong launches AI and asset strategy with $7.5M private placement, selling 1,989,392 shares at $3.77/share.
UBS FACES EXTRA $26B CAPITAL REQUIREMENT UNDER SWISS PROPOSAL

news.summary: Manchester United (NYSE: MANU) stock rose following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The football club recorded quarterly net sales of 160.5 million British Pounds, down from 136.7 million British Pounds last year. In U.S. Dollars, quarterly sales totaled $202.03 million, slightly below analysts' expectations of $202.47 million. Total revenues grew by 17.4% in the quarter due to increases in all three main revenue streams. The boost was attributed to a rise in matches played during the period, driven by strong performance in the UEFA Europa League and high demand for the Club's hospitality offerings.
news.headline: Manchester United stock rises after Q3 results; net sales of £160.5M, total revenues up 17.4%; missed street view by $0.44M.

news.summary: San Francisco - Pottery Barn Kids, a brand under Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the leading digital-first, design-oriented, and eco-conscious home retailer globally, has revealed their partnership with The Pokémon Company International to introduce a fresh line of home decor and accessories showcasing beloved Pokémon characters. Pokémon, established in 1996, has risen to be a worldwide sensation and a top entertainment franchise. The collaboration aims to bring Pokémon fans a new collection of products as part of Pottery Barn Kids’ offerings.
news.headline: Pottery Barn Kids partners with Pokémon for new home collection. Pokémon, a global success since 1996. Williams-Sonoma involved.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASO) based in Katy, Texas declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for the fiscal quarter ended May 3, 2025.
news.headline: Academy Sports & Outdoors declares $0.13 quarterly cash dividend. Board of Directors announced on June 5, 2025.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Biorn Corporation, a well-established debt collection agency with more than 40 years of experience, is welcoming new clients to benefit from its trusted services. Known for its emphasis on trust and results, Biorn Corporation is recognized for its performance in the industry. Clients are invited to experience the expertise of the company, which has garnered praise from many as the go-to debt collection agency.
news.headline: Biorn Corporation announces proven recovery solutions for hardest-to-collect accounts, with over four decades of leadership.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued its daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. The update offers valuable market insights before the trading day commences. J.D. Durkin presented the pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can consult the NYSE Pre-market update for crucial information ahead of trading, aiding in their decision-making process.
news.headline: NYSE Pre-Market Update: Circle shares soar on first day on NYSE trading floor, J.D. Durkin delivers the insights on June 6.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, in Glen Burnie, Maryland, Quarterfield Dental Arts celebrated the transition of ownership to Dr. Pooja Soni, DDS. Dr. Soni has taken over the practice following the passing of Dr. Paul Miller, maintaining the clinic's legacy. Her patient-centered and compassionate care approach has been well-received by the community. This change marks a significant moment for the practice and its clients, showcasing a commitment to quality dental care.
news.headline: Dental practice in Glen Burnie welcomes new owner Dr. Pooja Soni DDS, continuing legacy of Dr. Paul Miller.

news.summary: Anglo American (OTCQX: AAUKD) is in the process of initiating a formal sales process for its diamond unit, De Beers. The company has held ownership of the brand since 2011, but a significant restructuring that followed a failed $49 billion bid from BHP last year prompted a shift in focus towards other commodities. As reported by Bloomberg, there are three potential bidders interested in acquiring the 136-year-old diamond brand. These include former De Beers CEOs Gareth Penny and Bruce Cleaver, as well as Australian mining executive Michael O'Keeffe. Penny, who steered De Beers through the 2008 financial crisis, now serves as chairman of Ninety One (OTCPK: NINTF), an investment firm with assets exceeding $175 billion. Cleaver, who resigned as De Beers CEO in 2023, currently chairs Gemfields (OTCPK: PLLHF), a gemstone mining company specializing in emeralds and rubies.
news.headline: Anglo American prepares to sell De Beers; 3 potential buyers emerge, including former CEOs Gareth Penny and Bruce Cleaver.

news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG) announced an update on their initiative to secure a new revolving credit facility, following the April 25, 2025, announcement. The company has successfully received approvals from a Schedule I Canadian bank for a Senior Secured Revolving Credit Facility of up to USD 6 million. This Facility is designated for financing working capital and growth initiatives. Bragg is a prominent global B2B iGaming content and technology provider.
news.headline: Bragg Gaming secures new revolving credit facility up to USD 6 million for working capital and growth initiatives.

news.summary: South San Francisco, California, June 06, 2025 - Nkarta, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol NKTX, has introduced Shawn Rose, M.D. Ph.D., as the new Chief Medical Officer (CMO) and Head of Research and Development (R&D), effective June 23, 2025. Rose will succeed David R. Shook, M.D., who is resigning from the position to explore alternative prospects within the oncology field. Nkarta focuses on developing engineered natural killer (NK) cell therapies for autoimmune disease treatment.
news.headline: Nkarta appoints Shawn Rose as CMO & Head of R&D, replacing David R. Shook, M.D. who is stepping down.

news.summary: In Dublin, a database titled "Germany Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Frankfurt remains the primary hub for data centers, accommodating both current and forthcoming capacities. The projected power capacity of upcoming data centers is almost 1.8 times greater than the existing capacity, reflecting significant expansion in the German market. Key players such as NTT DATA, VIRTUS Data Centres, Maincubes, and CyrusOne are spearheading the upcoming developments with substantial projects.
news.headline: Germany's data center market shows strong growth potential with upcoming power capacity 1.8x higher than existing. Leading players include NTT DATA, VIRTUS Data Centres, Maincubes, and CyrusOne.

news.summary: Dublin - A database named "Greece Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. In Greece, Athens leads as the location for all upcoming data centers, boasting a total of over 250 MW of IT power capacity. The upcoming data center capacity in the country is nearly five times larger than the existing capacity. The major players in the Greek market are Digital Realty and Italia Telecom Sparkle, collectively possessing over [insert total number] data centers.
news.headline: Greece's data center portfolio analysis reveals Athens as a hub with 250 MW IT power capacity. Digital Realty & Italia Telecom lead market.
